summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and low-signal/instant closeout is disabled, so each hydrated candidate is classified conservatively from the preflight artifact. Security-sensitive candidates are routed individually; unrelated non-security candidates are kept open for normal maintainer, proof, or author follow-up.

actions.reason: Useful linked fix candidate, but not closable or mergeable in this plan-mode inventory shard.
Keep open as the current contributor PR path for the Agents UI model-selection/catalog work.
Keep open as a related candidate fix for #55512; proof/review blockers prevent merge or fixed-by closeout.
Security-boundary and broad mission-control changes are out of scope for ProjectClownfish inventory cleanup.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; the PR is useful but blocked by correctness review and failing checks.
Sandbox exec-server filesystem bridge work is routed to central OpenClaw security handling for this run.
Keep as a related narrow non-security PR; no merge is allowed and the durable review state is still needs changes.
Keep open as related Windows gateway normalization work; overlapping linked PR evidence is insufficient for safe superseded/duplicate closeout.
Live hydrated state is unavailable from the artifact for this candidate.
Keep open as related avatar-override work; overlapping live PR evidence is not enough for safe closeout in this inventory shard.
